calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ismat Dajani for petitioners Marilyn Savage and Mary Lou Allen (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on the Amended Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed.

The Court and counsel discussed the circumstances of the original will having been lodged in Utah. Mr. Dajani explained that the decedent had created a trust while he was living in California, but later moved to Utah and amended the trust to state that it was governed by the laws of Utah.

Following discussion, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated January 13, 2013, is admitted to probate. Marilyn Savage and Mary Lou Allen are appointed co-administrators with will annexed with full IAEA authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for March 22, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
